body.title: [sprint] Route devstral worker tier to local Ollama (Hex) — register ollama ModelSpec + worker rule
body.intention: I intend that DickSimnel's builder inference runs on free local Hex, so the DS cost constraint lifts and the first real build is affordable.
body.description:
**Problem:** DS 'ollama-only mode' requests model `devstral-small-2:24b`, but EVERY Ollama ModelSpec in the registry is bound to source `ollama_cloud` — the local `ollama` source (sources.py:254, base_url from `INFERENCE_ENDPOINT`, default 127.0.0.1:11434) has ZERO models registered. So a worker dispatch resolves to the CLOUD, never to Hex. Pointing `INFERENCE_ENDPOINT` at Hex alone does nothing because the rules engine has no local-ollama candidate to pick.
**Proposed shape:** (1) Register `ModelSpec(model_id='devstral-small-2:24b', source_name='ollama', tier='worker', ...)` in models_registry.py alongside the existing cloud spec. (2) Add a `RoutingRule(task_class='worker', model='devstral-small-2:24b', source='ollama')` in rules_engine.py `_DEFAULT_RULES`, prioritized so the LOCAL source is preferred WHEN AVAILABLE (Hex reachable) and falls back to `ollama_cloud` when not — local is free + is the Hex-dogfood target. (3) Set `INFERENCE_ENDPOINT=http://10.0.0.100:11434` in the DS launch env / uu_bash_profile. (4) Reconcile the DEAD source name `local_ollama` in rules_engine.py:95-96 (batch rules) → `ollama` (no source named `local_ollama` is ever registered).
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/models_registry.py, rules_engine.py; env (uu_bash_profile.sh / DS launch env). Inference Proxy only (tier-not-model preserved; model_override is the existing DS path).
**Design rules:** ALL inference through the Proxy; no direct OR/Anthropic; log the source/model selection at the crossing; no SQLite.
**Scope boundary:** routing + registration + env only; does NOT touch ToolLoop, the trivial ticket, or the smoke driver (sibling tickets).
**Completion criteria:** a unit test on the rules engine: a worker dispatch with model_override='devstral-small-2:24b' resolves to source `ollama` at base_url `http://10.0.0.100:11434` when that source is available, and to `ollama_cloud` when not; grep `local_ollama` → 0 live refs.
**Test plan:** rules_engine selection test red→green (local preferred when available; cloud fallback); grep-gate on `local_ollama`.
